description: Chickasha Daily Express GRAN LEE EVANS PUBLISHFKSAXH PROPRIETORS GEORGE H EVANS EDITOR WILLIAM F GKAXLWS BUSINESS MANAGER Entered at the Posioffice in the City ot Chickasha Indian IVrrirorv as Matter of the Second Clas SUBSCRIPTION KATES einfflrCopy Bcnta f r ws oy carrr 10 cent Par puarter V months in advance tl00 Far ymr in dvmnc 400 Weekly published every Friday 100 mm mir it you fail to ret your paper OFFICE PHONE NO 43 Q COUNTY 4 LA1 SsHA CHICKASHA IND TER JULY 24 1905 THAT CONSTITUTIONAL CONVENTION A Special dispatch to the Kansas City Star from Muskogee under date of July 21 contains about as much misinformation as could possibly lie crowded into the space used The purpose of the article is to boost the socalled constitutional convention wblch is to be held in Muskogee August 21 and in doing so an effort is made to discredit the recent Oklahoma City statehood convention It is stated that the Muskogee convention is backed by the business men of Indian Territory and the Indians while the Oklahoma City convention was dominated wholly by the politicians of both territor ies It is also stated that all the Indians and practi cally
